title: PvP Pack
body:
Welcome to My Special Edition PvP Pack!
This resource pack is a carefully crafted Special Edition designed to provide a smoother, more competitive, and visually pleasing Minecraft experience. Whether you are into BedWars, SkyWars, or Crystal PvP, this pack enhances every visual aspect of the game.

⚔️ Key Features
This pack includes a complete overhaul of essential PvP elements:

Custom Swords & Tools: Shortened and refined designs for better screen visibility.

Smooth Armors: Clean and optimized armor textures that look great in any fight.

Custom GUI: A transparent and modern interface that doesn't block your view.

Enhanced Animations: Includes custom Damage Animations and Breaking Animations to give you better feedback during combat.

Optimized Ores & Blocks: Clearer outlines and cleaner textures for better visibility.

✨ Visual Improvements
Custom Potions & Apples: Easily distinguishable items for quick inventory management.

Custom Enchant Effects: A subtle and clean glow that doesn't distract you.

Particle Effects: Custom effects designed to keep your FPS high while looking sharp.

Why should you use this pack?
This pack is not just about looks; it's about performance. Every texture has been optimized to ensure you get the best FPS possible without sacrificing the aesthetic of the game. Give yourself the competitive edge with this Special Edition!
